Agar time na bhi paas ho raha ho ya neend na aa rahi ho, toh sirf 10 minute ke liye thodi der aankhein band karke let jana bhi ek tarah ki neend jaisa aaram deta hai. Aankhein band karne se dimaag ko naya data milna band ho jata hai aur wo khud ko thanda kar leta hai.

title: Saans aur Dil ki Dhadkan
intended_use: Listening to own heartbeat for grounding.
content: Jab aapko bohot tez tension feel ho ya anxiety ho rahi ho aisi jagah jahan koi madad ke liye na ho, toh baithkar apne haath apne seene par rakhein. Apne dil ki lagaatar chalti dhadkan ko dhyan se sunein. Sochein ki yeh dil bina ruke aapko zinda rakhne ke liye mehanat kar raha hai. Yeh chhota sa dhyaan aapko darawni sochon se nikal kar present mein wapas laata hai.

title: Sab Kuch Ek Dum Se Nahi Hoga
intended_use: Reduces panic of having too much to do.
content: Jab 10 kaam samne pade hote hain, toh humein lagta hai ki hum fail ho gaye kyunki sab ekdum se nahi ho raha. Par sachai yeh hai ki aapke paas do hath aur ek dimaag hai. Ek time par ek hi kaam ho sakta hai. Lambi saans lo aur sabse zaroori ek kaam chuno. Baaki sab kuch der ke liye bhool jao. Ek-ek karke nipatane se pahad bhi chota ho jata hai.

title: Darr Ke Aage
intended_use: Facing small fears sequentially.
content: Darr hamesha us cheez se lagta hai jo humne abhi tak face nahi ki. Hum dimaag mein us cheez ka ek hawwa bana lete hain ki 'mujhse nahi hoga'. CBT kahti hai ki jis cheez se darr lagta hai, usko thoda sa chhu kar dekho. Agar naye logon se baat karne mein darr lagta hai, toh bas ek baar kisi ko 'Hello' bol kar dekho. Aapko realise hoga darr sirf dimaag mein tha, asliyat mein nahi.

title: Udasi Aur Depressed Hone Mein Farak
intended_use: Distinguishes normal sad days from deeper issues mildly.
content: Kabhi kabhi koi khaas wajah na hone par bhi man bohot udaas rehta hai. Iska matab yeh bilkul nahi ki aap depressed ho. Jaise physical energy up down hoti hai, waise hi mood bhi up down hota hai. Ek gande din ko le kar panic na karein. Bas khud ko waqt dein. Raat ko so jayen, agle din ya do din mein cheezein wapas theek mehsoos hone lagengi.

title: Kaam aur Thakan ka Jaal
intended_use: Breaking the cycle of feeling guilty when tired.
content: Hum ek ajeeb chakkar mein faste hain: Jab hum thake hue hote hain toh theek se kaam nahi kar paate, aur kaam na kar paane ki wajah se humein guilt hota hai, aur voh guilt aur zyada thaka deta hai. Is chakkar ko todne ka ek hi tarika hai: Pura, proper rest lena bina is guilt ke. Dimag ki battery full charge kiye bina engine start karne ki koshish bilkul kaam nahi karti.

title: Naam Badalna Band Karein
intended_use: Stopping self-labeling.
content: Agar ek baar paneer ki sabzi jal jaye, toh kya aap hamesha ke liye 'kharab cook' ban gaye? Nahi na. Toh zindagi ki kisi ek choti failure par aap khud ko pighla hua 'loser', 'stupid', ya 'bewakoof' jaise tag ya label kyun dete ho? Ek galti hui hai, sirf uss galti ki baat karo. Apne poore character par nishana mat saadhna. Aise label dimaag ko sach lagne lagte hain.

title: Worry Time Fix Karein
intended_use: Scheduling worry time in Hindi.
content: Din bhar chinta karte rahoge toh kuch nahi kar paoge. Ek mast tarika yeh hai ki apni chinta ko ek waqt de do. Jaise, sham ko 5 se 5:20 tak main jee bhar ke chinta karunga. Uske ilawa, jab bhi din mein koi buri soch aaye, usay copy par likh lo aur kaho, 'Main 5 baje iske baare mein sochunga'. Mostly 5 baje tak bhool hi jaoge.

title: Sirf Sunna Kaafi Hai
intended_use: How to actively listen to a friend easily.
content: Jab koi aapse aakar rotay hue apni problem batata hai, toh dimag force karta hai ki turant koi achhi si advice dekar uski problem theek kardo. Par log advice sunne nahi aate, wo apna dukh halka karne aate hain. Aise mein unko solution mat do, bas suno. Kaho ki 'Mujhe samajh aa raha hai tumhein kaisa feel ho raha hai, yeh waqayi bura hai'. Sirf samajhna hi sabse bada sahara hota hai.

title: Maanne Ki Taqat (Acceptance)
intended_use: Accepting uncomfortable realities without fighting them constantly.
content: Dukh iss baat se nahi hota ki problem aa gayi, dukh iss baat se hota hai ki hum accept nahi kar paate ki 'yeh mere sath kyun ho raha hai'. ACT therapy mein sikhate hain ki barish ho rahi ho toh aasmaan se ladne ka fayda nahi, chhata nikalna behtar hai. Jis moment aap accept kar lete ho ki 'haan, ye situation abhi kharab hai', apka aadha stress waheen khatam ho jata hai.

title: Koi Perfect Nahi
intended_use: Addresses the desire to be a flawless person.
content: Hum sab sochte hain ki ideal ban kar hi pyar ya respect milti hai. Jo mistake free ho, hamesha khush rahe. Lekin perfection duniya ka sabsbese bada jhooth hai. Jo dikhne mein perfect lag raha hai, wo andar se utna hi tuta hua ya preshan ho sakta hai. Aap jaise ho, apni kamiyon aur khubiyon ke sath, exactly waise hi kafi ho. Machine nahi ho jo har waqt theek se kaam kare.

title: Ghumne Jaane Ka Fayda
intended_use: Encourages a small daily walk.
content: Pura din band kamre mein screen ke samne baithe rehne se thoughts aapas mein takrane lagte hain. Bahar fresh hawa mein paanch minute chalne se actually dimaag ke raste khul jate hain. Zaroori nahi ki exercise hi ki jaye, bas aas-paas ka rasta dekhte hue chalo. Dhoop, hawa aur bahar ka shor dimaag ka internal shor chup kara dete hain.

title: Man Mein Jo Chal Raha Hai Likho
intended_use: Journaling simply to clear the mental load.
content: Ek time par dimaag mein kitni tension store karोगे? Ek paper lo, aur dil mein jo bhi bhadaas bhari ho, bina grammar ya spelling soche uspar utaar do. Kisi aur ko toh padhana nahi hai! Likhne se dimaag ka kachra paper par aa jata hai. Jab dimaag blank ho jaye, paper ko chaho toh faad kar fek do. Ye exercise ek chote therapy session jaisa kaam karti hai.

title: Neend Aur Mood Ka Connection
intended_use: Links sleep deprivation directly to bad mood.
content: Kabhi note kiya hai jis raat neend poori nahi hoti, agle din har baat chubh rahi hoti hai? Neend kam aana sidha aapke mood ko control karta hai. Agar aaj poora din kisi baat par rona aa raha hai ya gussa aa raha hai, toh pehle check karo ki pichli raat kitni der soye the? Shayad problem utni badi nahi hai, bas neend poori na hone ki wajah se dimaag usey bada bana raha hai.

title: Dusron Ki Fikar Karna Chhodo
intended_use: Letting go of responsibility for others' feelings.
content: Aap akele sabko khush karne ka theka lekar nahi ghoom sakte. Agar kisi dusre ka mood kharab hai, toh automatically yeh mat soch len ki 'shayad meri wajah se hai'. Logon ke paas apni hajaron problems hoti hain. Unki feelings ki responsibility khud par mat lijiye. Agar unhe aapse problem hogi, toh aakar bataenge. Apne app soch soch kar darrna band karein.

title: Kisi aur Se Apni Zindagi na Napein
intended_use: Stopping comparison with successful peers.
content: Agar aap aam ke ped ko uski jaldi badhne ki speed se compare karege aur tulsi ke paudhe ko dekhenge, toh tulsi ka paudha fuzul lagega. Aap aur aapke doston ka life start point aur raste bilkul alag hain. Unhone 25 mein job li aur aap 28 tak job dhoondh rahe ho, yeh apka fail hona nahi hai. Sabki movie ki script alag alag hoti hai. Apni race par focus karo.

title: Log Kya Kahenge
intended_use: Handling 'log kya kahenge' (what will people say).
content: Bharat (India) mein sabsbese badi bimari is soch ki h 'Char log kya kahenge'. Sachi bataun toh wo 4 log khud apne gharon ki problems me aise phase hue hain ki unke pas tumhare bare me sochne ka tym nahi h. Aur agar unhone kuch kaha bhi, toh kya badlega? Unki bakwas aapki roti nahi chin rahi. Jis din un 4 logon ko khush rakhna band kar diya, aadhi azadi tabhi mil jayegi.

title: Rona Aaye Toh Ro Lena Chahiye
intended_use: Validates crying as a healthy emotional release.
content: Bohot baar hum aansu rokne ki koshish karte hain kyunki humein lagta hai rona kamzori hai. Par rona toh body ka apna tareeka hai dimaag ka pressure cooker halka karne ka. Jab andar bohot andar bohot tension bhar jati hai, toh aansuon ke zariye wo thodi release hoti hai. Agar rona aa raha hai, toh khud ko mat rokiye. Thodi der ro lene ke baad dimaag actually thoda saaf aur halka mehsoos hota hai.

title: Chhoti Khushiyan (Small Wins)
intended_use: Finding positivity in tiny daily achievements.
content: Jab waqt kharab chal raha ho, toh humein lagta hai ki kuch bhi acha nahi ho raha. Par aese mein badi kamyabi ka wait mat kariye. Subah time par uthna, achhe se nahana, ek cup badiya chai banakar peena—yeh sab bhi chhoti-chhoti kamyabiyan (wins) hain. In palon ko recognize karein. In chhoti cheezon par thoda khush hona seekhein, isse dimaag ko achha signal milta hai ki bhale hi problem ho, par sab theek bhi ho raha hai.

title: Gusse Ko Kaise Samjhein
intended_use: Helps distinguish anger from the deeper feelings underneath.
content: Gussa jaldi aata hai jab humein lagta hai koi humari baat nahi samajh raha ya humare saath kuch unfair hua hai. Par gussa akele nahi aata, wo kisi darde ya darr ko chhupa raha hota hai. Jab tez gussa aaye, toh turant react mat karein. Kamre se bahar niklein, paani pijiye, aur khud se puchiye: 'Main gusse mein hoon, ya andar hi andar dukhi ya akela feel kar raha hoon?'

title: Aas Paas Dekho (5-4-3-2-1)
intended_use: Translates sensory grounding into completely simple terms.
content: Dimaag ud chuka ho aur samajh na aaye kya karein, toh ek simple game kheliye. Aankhein kholiye aur aas paas 5 aisi cheezein dhoondhiye jinka rang neela ho, ya lal ho. Phir dhyan dekar 4 aawaazein sunne ki koshish karein—jaise bahar gaadi, AC ki aawaz. Phir 3 cheezon ko chhu kar dekhein—kambal, deewar, ya khud ka haath. Ye karne se aapka dhyan fikr se hatkar asli duniya mein aa jayega.

title: Kal Ki Fikar
intended_use: Addresses anxiety about future outcomes.
content: 'Kal kya hoga?', 'Agar wo nahi hua toh kya hoga?' Hum zindagi ka aadha waqt us 'kal' ke baare mein sochne mein nikal dete hain jisko humne aaj tak dekha hi nahi hai. Jo hona hai, wo hoga, aap chinta karke usko badal nahi sakte. Aapke haath mein sirf aaj ka waqt hai. Jab khud ko aesa sochte hue paayein, toh bolein: 'Kal ka kal dekhunga, abhi mujhe sirf apna aagla 1 ghanta theek se nikaalna hai.'

title: Khud Se Pyar Se Baat Karein
intended_use: Challenges negative self-talk.
content: Kabhi dhyan se suniye ki jab aap koi galti karte hain, toh khud ko mann hi mann mein kya-kya bolte hain. 'Mai toh pagal hoon', 'Mujhse toh kuch theek nahi hota'. Socho agar tumhara dost udaas hota toh kya tum usko bhi yahi sab bolte? Bilkul nahi! Tum usko hausla dete. Toh fir khud ko ye sab kyun bolna? Agli baar galti ho, toh apne aap ko waise hi sambhalo jaise kisi achhe dost ko sambhalte ho.

title: Sab Kuch Ek Saath Nahi
intended_use: Reduces overwhelm from large task lists.
content: Jab karne ko 100 cheezein hoti hain, aur waqt kam hota hai, toh dimaag darr ke maare kaam hi shuru nahi karta. Pura pahad mat dekhiye, nahi toh darr lagega ki kaise chadunga. Sirf apna agla kadam dekhiye. Jo sabse chhoti cheez abhi kar sakte ho—jaise sirf apne books ko bag se nikalna, ya ek single message ka reply dena—wo complete karlo. Ek baar shuruwat hoti hai toh aage ka rasta thoda aasaan dikhne lagta hai.

title: Dusron Se Khud Ko Milana
intended_use: Tackles social comparison strongly.
content: Instagram aur WhatsApp par toh har koi bohot khush nazar aata hai. Nayi gaadi, nai job, achhe kapde. Par koi bhi apte bure din social media par post nahi karta. Agar aap apni haqeeqat ko dusron ke filter waali photos se compare karoge, toh dukh hi milega. Har insaan ki life mein pareshani hoti hai, bas tarika alag hota hai. Dusron ki journey par focus karne ke bajaye, khud par focus karein.

title: Subah Phone Mat Dekhiye
intended_use: Advice to stop doom-scrolling upon waking up.
content: Jaise hi aankh khulti hai, hamara pehla haath phone par jata hai. Aur phone kholte hi 50 news, messages aur emails humare dimag par load daal dete hain, bina humein uthne ka mauka diye. Ye din ki aisi shuruwaat hai jaise uthte hi kisi ne aapko push kar diya ho. Koshish karein pehle ahe ghante phone side rakhein. Aaram se uthiye, muh dhoiye, paani pijiye, aur fir duniya ki problems se deal kariye.

title: Dimag Kyun Thak Jata Hai
intended_use: Explain mental fatigue in very basic terms.
content: Aapko kabhi lagta hai ki bina koi physical kaam kiye bhi aap bohot thak gaye hain? Ye isliye hota hai kyunki dimaag lagatar chal raha hota hai. Jab hum zyada sochte hain, ya tension lete hain, toh dimaag ki battery low ho jati hai, bilkul phone ki tarah. Aise mein 'arrey main itna kamzor kyun feel kar raha hoon' soch kar khud ko gaali mat dijiye. Dimaag ko bas thodi der switch off hone ka time chahiye. Ek chota sa break lijiye, bina phone ke.

title: Ghabrahat Mein Saans
intended_use: Basic breathing guide for sudden panic.
safety_notes: Easy to follow, no strict counting.
content: Jab bhi achanak se darr ya ghabrahat lage kaanpte hue, toh sabse pehla kaam apni saans par dhyan dena hai. Darr mein hum jaldi-jaldi saans lene lagte hain. Isko todne ke liye, ek lambi saans ander lijiye, thodi der rokiye, aur phir dheere-dheere muh se aise chhodiye jaise chaai ko foonk maar rahe ho. 3-4 baar aisa karne se dil ki dhadkan thodi shant hone lagti hai.

title: Overthinking Ka Chakkar
intended_use: Explains overthinking simply as a stuck record.
content: Overthinking aisi cheez hai jaise ek hi gaana dimaag mein atak gaya ho aur baar-baar baj raha ho. Hum sochte hain ki zyada sochne se problem khatam ho jayegi, lekin asal mein dimaag sirf ek gol-gol chakkar laga raha hota hai jiska koi ant nahi. Is chakkar ko todne ke liye, jab lagatar purani baatein yaad aayein, toh khud ko rokein aur bolein: 'Bus, abhi main ispe aur nahi sochunga, kal dekhunga.'

title: Neend Nahi Aa Rahi?
intended_use: Simple advice for sleepless nights.
content: Raat ko sab sant hota hai toh dimaag sabse zyada shor machata hai. Agar bed par lete hue 20 minute ho gaye hain aur neend nahi aa rahi, toh karwatein mat badalte rahiye. Uth kar bahar baithiye, ya thoda paani pijiye. Koi boring si book padhiye ya dimaag mein 100 se ulte number giniye (100, 99, 98...). Jab aankhon mein thakan mehsoos ho, tab wapas bed par aaiye.

title: Galtiyan Sabse Hoti Hain
intended_use: Normalizing mistakes and reducing self-blame.
content: Agar aaj kuch galat ho gaya, chahe office mein ya ghar par, toh khud ko pura din bura-bhala kehne se kuch nahi badlega. Galtiyan insaan se hi hoti hain. Koi bhi perfect nahi hai, hum sab bus koshish kar rahe hain. Khud ko ek dost ki tarah samjhaiye, 'Han, galti hui, aage se dhyan rakhunga, par main iske liye poori zindagi khud ko saza nahi de sakta.' Aage badhna zaroori hai.

title: Break Lena Zaruri Hai
intended_use: Valuing rest in a hustle culture without medical jargon.
content: Logon ko lagta hai ki hamesha lagatar lagte rehne se chize jaldi hoti hain. Lekin bin break liye dimaag slow ho jata hai, aur choti mistakes badh jati hai. Aaram karna koi buri baat nahi hai. Jab mehsoos ho ki dimag aur body thak chuke hain, toh phone side me rakho aur 5 minute bas shanti se aankhe band kar ke beth jao. Thoda sa pause lena actually tumhe aage ke din ke liye active kar deta hai.

title: Sabko Khush Nahi Rakh Sakte
intended_use: Releasing the pressure to be a people-pleaser.
content: Kabhi socha hai dimaag kitna thakta hai jab hum sochte hain, 'Usko mera jawab bura toh ni lagega?' Hum poori zindagi sabko khush rakhne mein nikal aate hain, aur aakhir me khudko hi naraaz kar lete hain. Reality ye hai ki tum chah ke bhi sabko 100% waqt khush nahi rakh sakte. Aisa theka mat uthao. Agar koi tumse kisi baat par naraaz bhi hota hai, toh theek hai, thoda time do unhe naraz rehne. Tum apni shanti par dhyan do.

title: Andar Ki Awaz (Mantra)
intended_use: Creates a stable inner thought during chaotic moments.
content: Jab as paas ki situations control se bahar lage, aur andar ghabrahat ho, apne aapse koi ek sentence baar-baar bolo jise dimag me thahrav aye. Jaise, 'Abhi jo hai usme mai surakshit hoon', ya 'Ye waqt bhi nikal jayega, hamesha aisa ni rahega.' Is ektarfa awaz se, tumhare dimag ko bhatakne ka mauka nahi milta, aur body normal mehsus karna shuru karti hai.

title: Body Aur Peth Ke Beech Connection
intended_use: Explains gut-brain physical symptoms.
content: Pehle bhi dhyan diya hoga jab exam ho ya koi nayi job ka pehla din, toh peth me ajeeb sa hona start hota hai. Jaise butterflies, ya nausea. Peth aur dimaag ka ek connection hota hai, anxiety sidha digestion pr asar dalti hai. Aisa jab ho, darao nahi. Samjho ki ye bs body ka tareeka hai tension dikhane ka. Thoda sa plain pani piyo, kuch halka kha lena, body jaldi cool down hogi.

title: Ek Kaam Ek Baar (Multitasking Jhut Hai)
intended_use: Reduces burnout from trying to do everything at once.
content: Aaj kal sabko 'Multitasking' aani chahiye aisi soch ban gai hai. Sath me TV, laptop, aur mobile sab ek dam. Aisa karne se dimag itna zyada load leta hai aur memory kamzor hoti hai. Khana kha rahe hoto bs khao, kaam kr rahe ho toh ekbaar me ek hi chiz kro. Ek chiz ko 15 min focus do, result badh jyga aur dimag cool rhta hai.

title: Kuch Na Karne Ka Haq (Right to Do Nothing)
intended_use: Giving permission to rest fully and without guilt.
content: Kisi din agar lagta ho aaj man ni hai, toh koi guilty (apraadh bodh) feel karne ki zarurat nai. Aapko 'Kuch na karne' ka poora adhikaar hai. Hamari zindagi race ni hai jisme continuously bhagna zaruri ho. Bed pe shanti se padey rehna, window se bahar dekhna..ye koi time waste nai balki apne brain ko relax krne ka tarika hai.

title: Paani Ki Takat
intended_use: Uses cold water as a reset method for high stress.
content: Rone ke baad, ya gussa ane pr.. jb chehre pr heat mehsoos ho rhi ho.. sidha washroom jao. Bhar kr thanda paani muh pr maaro. Scientific reason ye hai ke thanda pani sidhe aapse uss time ke loop ko tor deta hai, body turant samajhti h ke current moment mein wapis aa rhi hai. Paani se fresh hokar ek glass pani piyo.. adha stress wahin gir jyga.

title: Thik Ni Hai Toh Thik Hai (It’s Okay Not To Be Okay)
intended_use: Promoting acceptance of low moments.
content: Hamesha khush rehna ka dikhawa karna hi sabse bada boj ban jata hai. Agar aap pareshan hai, ya gussa, ya sad hain, ye poori tarha okay hai. Aap insaan hain machine nahi jisme switch on/off hota ho. Kabhi-kabhi cheezein bekaar hoti hai, aur usey maanne se bojh kam mehsus hota hai. Kisi par bharosa karte hoto bs boldiya kro yaar aaj din bekaar bitha hai, man ni lg raha.

title: Badalne Waali Soch
intended_use: Addressing unhelpful thinking patterns about permanent failure.
content: Kabhi asa socha hai, 'Meri kismat hi khrab hai hmesha aisa hu hi hota hai.' Ise negative filter wali soch kehte h. Ye humare dimaag mein bas jata hai aur achhi chizein dikhne band ho jti h. Koi b bura din ya failuar sari zindagi ni chalega. Jis din bura lage, apna dimagh yahi baat baar-baar yaad krwa kar clear kro, 'Ye phase permanent nai, isay theek hne ka theek wqt lagega.'

title: Kisi Se Baat Karo
intended_use: Encouraging simple sharing of thoughts.
safety_notes: Community building without demanding deep therapy talk.
content: Jab tak problem andar dimaag mein rehti hai wo bht badi lagti hai. Jaise hi kisi ke saamne shabdon mein bayan krogey toh waise hi aadhi pareshani durr hne lgti hai. Ye jruri nai har baar solution hi dhoondha jye, sirf koi sunn le, ye b aram deta h. Ek aise trust wale insan ko message or call kro ki mjy sirf aj thodi batein share krni h.

title: Bina Matlab Ki Fikrein
intended_use: Calling out catastrophic worry patterns.
content: Agar aisa ho gaya toh kya hoga? Agar waise hua to log kya kahenge? Ye 'Agar, magar' mein dimag jalebi ban chuka hta. 90% cheezein jinka apko dar hota h wo kabhi hoti hi ni, aur un pr sochne pr ham bas dukh pte h. Future hum nahi banate h, sirf next step humare haath me h. Woi lijiye bs.

title: Social Media Ka Dhoka
intended_use: Separating reel life from reality.
content: Doosre logon ko phone k andar hamesha khush, ghumate phirte aur succeed karte theek usme bs 15-second tk ka hota hai. Puri life ke baare mein sochiya jaye, to unko bhi tension aur udasi woi sab feel hta jo hume. Internet ki posts dekh kar khud ki zindagi judge mat kijiye. Internet pr filter lage hte han, asal zindagi hamesha thik si rahy yeh farq yaad rkhen.

title: Kaam aur Family Balance
intended_use: Dealing with dual demands realistically.
content: Ofiice ka load aur ghar ki expectations ke bich mein aksar hum khudko bhul jte han. Work/life balance aise nahi ata ke dono ek brabar hojaye, asal balance yeh hai ke office ko ghar mat laiye. Jo theek kaam k time ka tension usy ghar dakhil hone s pehle khtmn kren. Choti sari activity jo apne lay h unhe poora kare.

title: Dil Ki Dhadkan Sun'na
intended_use: Uses physical presence and tactile feedback for mindfulness.
content: Jb pareshan ho, to bs thodi dair dono hathon ko sine pr dil ke pass rkhkr uski beats ko feel kro. Sochein 'mera dil lagatar bina ruke, mujhe life dene me busy hai'. Ye ek simple sa kaam aapke dimag ka pura focus ek natural cheez par utaar deega aur sochti hoi batein peeche chut jayenge.

title: Pessimism (Hamesha Bura Sochna)
intended_use: Addressing unhelpful anticipatory anxiety.
content: Khushi manane se pehle dimag hume drata h 'Ab toh pakka bura hoga'. Aise sochna dimag ka tarika ha aapko tayar rkhne ka pr asal ma yeh confidence gira raha hota hai. Achi chiz ko poori feel kro bgair ye dar rkhe. Koi future ke dar ke liye ajj ka maza lene ko skip mat kro.

title: Na Kehna Seekhein
intended_use: How to say no simply and politely.
safety_notes: Focuses on personal energy over pleasing others.
content: Bina baat ke haami bhar dena tab tak, jab tak dimag aur shareer theek se sath na ho..ye bahut nuqsarndey ha. Ek baar pyare words me 'Na, ye kaam abhi mere capacity mai ni h', bol dena aapke man ki ghutan ko khatam karta. Logon ko aadat pad jyge, tumhare right k izzat karne ki.

title: Soch Mein Farak
intended_use: Reframing cognitive distortions conversationally.
content: Aap usay failure kahein, aur me use nayi chiz sekkahi kehlu.. toh dono ki feelign bdal jati hai. Ye sab aapke dimag aur labzon ki game h. Agli br galti ho toh word 'mein barbard hugaya' usy replace krein.. 'main smjghaa ye option ghalt ta' aur usy aage chlyei.

title: Paani aur Pyaas
intended_use: Physical reminders to assist mental health.
content: Dimag ki 80% banawat pani se hti ha, aur adhe se ziada sirdard, irrtation aur chidhchida-pan ka krn dhydaraiton hota hai bs. Subha sham achi gairai mai paani peena bhi dimagh ki sehaht klyr bra wazni asar krta. Pani ka glas br pr samne rhiyekar dekhiy ga.

title: Purani Yaadein
intended_use: How to softly disconnect from old regret.
content: Purani ghaltion or bure waqt baarey sochna bilkul wese hai jese dead battery k charge karna - koi fayda nai. Jo pehle hwa wapis jakr badla nai jayga aur ye baat quabol krelena hi asli taqat ha. Pechy ke bajaye apne samne moujood pathar pr dyan thehrana chiye aj kal ke laye jise thekr ap kdam age dal skyen

title: Shaant Jageh Ki Kalpana
intended_use: Guided visualization exercise suitable for Hinglish phrasing.
content: Jab sab kuch ajeeb lage aur shor bht zaida ho. Apni aankein bheechkr koi esi safe aur pyara jagah sochein gher par ya kbhi chutiya pr guzari ho.. Us hawaye, mausam, ya kisi k hath ka chuna, sb dimag mai thehrane se.. sach me blood pressure kam hne ka kam start hone ka ehasass hta. Yh chhotay safe place technique aapke har qadam k sath hte hain.

title: Khud Ko Rokein (Pause Method)
intended_use: Taking a beat before reacting negatively to external triggers.
content: Tension aur baat begarne me sabse bra rol jldi wala response hota ha. Koi baat buri lgi uske pehle tum unhey kaho ke ghalt bat ha.. sirf 5sec ke liye pause kro apne apko aur wapis jwb diya jaa skta ah aram sa. Ye 'pause', jb ham dimag o thakan se wapis lata hai tb faizah ponchatah hai.

title: Apne Man Ki Suno
intended_use: Connecting to personal values over external rules.
content: Baar bar lagataah ha k kia yeh thik fainsal (decision) hai ya nahi, toh logo se salaa leni acchi baat ha, pr khudandar ap jante hi hain sachai. Agar andr ke awaaz aari ho ke 'mujhe yeh kam theek nahi lagra..' us awaz ko dabana ni chiye kyu ke ander wali baat ka smjh jyda jildi atah jb dimag ki taqt thk hu. Uske izzat kia krein.

title: Kitab Parhne Ka Niyam
intended_use: Offers reading as an accessible distraction and mind-soother.
content: Log kehte hain kitab parhne sa ankh thakti nahi? Asal ma kitab aapke dimagh ko single tasking sekhati. Ek waqt ek line padkr apka stress wala level phone aur movies ki multitasking s hat jtat ah.. Jb din bahut bechain se guzrey toh phone door rakhiya kisi kitaabb ke pages p dyan lagye aur dekhin neend ajate jalid hi

title: Achhe Dost Bhi Important Hain
intended_use: Focusing on the quality of relationships over quantity.
content: Galti kya hti ke log list bhar rakhtey han par sacche dost do ya teen milte hai jhan hm openly ro, hs, yah preshan ko asar bata saken. Asli relation wo jaise hm pure rahin bagihr filter laye... in relationships pe wakt bitana khud p ki gye thearipe (therapy) ke barbara hai. 50 followers sa bahtar 2 ese best friend bana kar dakhayen jinpe sab bata skyen.

title: Choti Choti Baaton Par Gussa
intended_use: Explains why we snap at small things.
safety_notes: Reduces guilt over snapping, encourages rest.
content: Aksar hum kisi aisi baat par chillane lagte hain jiska koi matlab nahi hota, jaise kisi ne glass theek se nahi rakha. Hume lagta hai hume us glass par gussa aa raha hai, par sachai yeh hai ki humari dimaag ki battery low hai. Jab hum andar se thake hue ya upset hote hain, toh sabse chhoti baat bhi trigger ban jati hai. Aise mein khud ko bura mat bolo, bas yeh samjho ki dimaag ko aaram chahiye.

title: Sab Kuch Ek Dum Se Nahi Hoga
intended_use: Reduces panic of having too much to do.
content: Jab 10 kaam samne pade hote hain, toh humein lagta hai ki hum fail ho gaye kyunki sab ekdum se nahi ho raha. Par sachai yeh hai ki aapke paas do hath aur ek dimaag hai. Ek time par ek hi kaam ho sakta hai. Lambi saans lo aur sabse zaroori ek kaam chuno. Baaki sab kuch der ke liye bhool jao. Ek-ek karke nipatane se pahad bhi chota ho jata hai.

title: Darr Ke Aage
intended_use: Facing small fears sequentially.
content: Darr hamesha us cheez se lagta hai jo humne abhi tak face nahi ki. Hum dimaag mein us cheez ka ek hawwa bana lete hain ki 'mujhse nahi hoga'. CBT kahti hai ki jis cheez se darr lagta hai, usko thoda sa chhu kar dekho. Agar naye logon se baat karne mein darr lagta hai, toh bas ek baar kisi ko 'Hello' bol kar dekho. Aapko realise hoga darr sirf dimaag mein tha, asliyat mein nahi.

title: Neend Aur Mood Ka Connection
intended_use: Links sleep deprivation directly to bad mood.
content: Kabhi note kiya hai jis raat neend poori nahi hoti, agle din har baat chubh rahi hoti hai? Neend kam aana sidha aapke mood ko control karta hai. Agar aaj poora din kisi baat par rona aa raha hai ya gussa aa raha hai, toh pehle check karo ki pichli raat kitni der soye the? Shayad problem utni badi nahi hai, bas neend poori na hone ki wajah se dimaag usey bada bana raha hai.

title: Zameen Par Pao (Grounding)
intended_use: Physical grounding using the floor.
content: Jab dimaag hawa mein ud raha ho aur ek ke baad ek negative thoughts aa rahe hon, toh ek kursi par aaram se baith jayein. Apne dono pao zameen par tika lein. Thoda sa dabav banayein aur us zameen ko mehsoos karein. Apne aap se bolein, 'Zameen ne mujhe sambhala hua hai. Main abhi yahan hoon, aur safe hoon'. Yeh chhota sa action dimaag ko wapas present mein le aayega.

title: Koi Perfect Nahi
intended_use: Addresses the desire to be a flawless person.
content: Hum sab sochte hain ki ideal ban kar hi pyar ya respect milti hai. Jo mistake free ho, hamesha khush rahe. Lekin perfection duniya ka sabsbese bada jhooth hai. Jo dikhne mein perfect lag raha hai, wo andar se utna hi tuta hua ya preshan ho sakta hai. Aap jaise ho, apni kamiyon aur khubiyon ke sath, exactly waise hi kafi ho. Machine nahi ho jo har waqt theek se kaam kare.

title: Ghumne Jaane Ka Fayda
intended_use: Encourages a small daily walk.
content: Pura din band kamre mein screen ke samne baithe rehne se thoughts aapas mein takrane lagte hain. Bahar fresh hawa mein paanch minute chalne se actually dimaag ke raste khul jate hain. Zaroori nahi ki exercise hi ki jaye, bas aas-paas ka rasta dekhte hue chalo. Dhoop, hawa aur bahar ka shor dimaag ka internal shor chup kara dete hain.

title: Dusron Ki Fikar Karna Chhodo
intended_use: Letting go of responsibility for others' feelings.
content: Aap akele sabko khush karne ka theka lekar nahi ghoom sakte. Agar kisi dusre ka mood kharab hai, toh automatically yeh mat soch len ki 'shayad meri wajah se hai'. Logon ke paas apni hajaron problems hoti hain. Unki feelings ki responsibility khud par mat lijiye. Agar unhe aapse problem hogi, toh aakar bataenge. Apne app soch soch kar darrna band karein.

title: Udasi Aur Depressed Hone Mein Farak
intended_use: Distinguishes normal sad days from deeper issues mildly.
content: Kabhi kabhi koi khaas wajah na hone par bhi man bohot udaas rehta hai. Iska matab yeh bilkul nahi ki aap depressed ho. Jaise physical energy up down hoti hai, waise hi mood bhi up down hota hai. Ek gande din ko le kar panic na karein. Bas khud ko waqt dein. Raat ko so jayen, agle din ya do din mein cheezein wapas theek mehsoos hone lagengi.

title: Worry Time Fix Karein
intended_use: Scheduling worry time in Hindi.
content: Din bhar chinta karte rahoge toh kuch nahi kar paoge. Ek mast tarika yeh hai ki apni chinta ko ek waqt de do. Jaise, sham ko 5 se 5:20 tak main jee bhar ke chinta karunga. Uske ilawa, jab bhi din mein koi buri soch aaye, usay copy par likh lo aur kaho, 'Main 5 baje iske baare mein sochunga'. Mostly 5 baje tak bhool hi jaoge.

title: Sirf Sunna Kaafi Hai
intended_use: How to actively listen to a friend easily.
content: Jab koi aapse aakar rotay hue apni problem batata hai, toh dimag force karta hai ki turant koi achhi si advice dekar uski problem theek kardo. Par log advice sunne nahi aate, wo apna dukh halka karne aate hain. Aise mein unko solution mat do, bas suno. Kaho ki 'Mujhe samajh aa raha hai tumhein kaisa feel ho raha hai, yeh waqayi bura hai'. Sirf samajhna hi sabse bada sahara hota hai.

title: Galt Faisla Bhi Theek Ho Sakta Hai
intended_use: Easing decision paralysis.
content: Dimaag kabhi yeh guarantee nahi dega ki 'hann yeh job ya yeh path 100% theek h'. Decision lete huey 50-50 chances hn hi han.. Tum koi sa bhrrr choice letay hi ek galataiya ek thiak faisal ssa banak sktktey hu... Failsey s bad un p dukh manahe ss akuchni hta .. Apnai choice lo aur usiahi agya theek karnai ke taraf dhiayn lagahdo. Koi ghir-waapsai ka rasta nh htih ha.

title: Chidchida Pan
intended_use: Explaining irritability simply.
content: Jb app har baat p chiadh rahay ho toh app bure insna naho... Ye dimaakh ki taar khicchh geye hk eiska ishaatra ah.. Ziyda wkt screen ko dakna.. khhana puaarh n kkhha hna, in wajoaoh hs a dimaag mein patience kam hr rjhata hy . Gussa wahan hy jb apkko arams cahiyaah bht zyhnda. Pani piyoi aur thdi der andyhrey kmray me liat jyoai.

title: Kisi Ko Pata Nahi Chalega (Imposter)
intended_use: Addressing imposter feelings in Hinglish.
content: Bhottbr lagrt haai k boss ya teachher ku ptahlg jaehgyh mjyy tj koch ai ata hi ahi , mrni kismut aai ghh ahh... Isey Imposter syndrome bkht hny. Par yakeen karo... har band akisi n skisi waqyy mein khudkko farudiya fll krtaa ahaiyeee. Tunmbhy apni mnattn k dam par agyy pounccchy hu, tum luck sye hnah hi ahaye yhsn tm qabilll hoo.

title: Khud Ko Saza Mat Do
intended_use: Stopping self-punishment loops.
content: Kuch bigad jaane pr.. aap apka mind hameshan khud pe chila rhaa. 'Mne kr kch thk n kiyah'. Yaad ralhiye khud ko muf kro giyn toh aage bddgy, gaaliaa dkrr aapp wahim phsn jgyge. Ye sb normal ghlytih hai.. aap aisi batien bs isilyh ktay ho ki aagey ghtltiy s e bbchh jho.. Pr yahan is self pnishmntk ka ki fydanai hn. Bs mff kkhud k rohh.

title: Nahi Kehna Bura Ni
intended_use: Reinforcing boundaries.
content: Logo ko humsha hnah karr ke apna dimkh thkka dene sy bd ma uper ahnsaan ni krty blky ap khudpe zzlim krh reh hoty.... Tmhr hr waat logo k ly present hnaah zoori nhihaii . Jbbb thky ho y moodn h... saaff sa 'Nhe yaarr, mein aabhy thka hua hn ni hy skeagh mhsjuy'. Ye khuda syp yaear hiha.

title: Aankhein Band Karna Bhi Aaram Hai
intended_use: Resting visually to help mental fatigue.
content: Pura din screen, phone, aur aas paas ki cheezon ko dekh kar dimaag lagatar data process karta hai. Agar time na bhi paas ho raha ho ya neend na aa rahi ho, toh sirf 10 minute ke liye thodi der aankhein band karke let jana bhi ek tarah ki neend jaisa aaram deta hai. Aankhein band karne se dimaag ko naya data milna band ho jata hai aur wo khud ko thanda kar leta hai.

title: Saans aur Dil ki Dhadkan
intended_use: Listening to own heartbeat for grounding.
content: Jab aapko bohot tez tension feel ho ya anxiety ho rahi ho aisi jagah jahan koi madad ke liye na ho, toh baithkar apne haath apne seene par rakhein. Apne dil ki lagaatar chalti dhadkan ko dhyan se sunein. Sochein ki yeh dil bina ruke aapko zinda rakhne ke liye mehanat kar raha hai. Yeh chhota sa dhyaan aapko darawni sochon se nikal kar present mein wapas laata hai.

title: Naam Badalna Band Karein
intended_use: Stopping self-labeling.
content: Agar ek baar paneer ki sabzi jal jaye, toh kya aap hamesha ke liye 'kharab cook' ban gaye? Nahi na. Toh zindagi ki kisi ek choti failure par aap khud ko pighla hua 'loser', 'stupid', ya 'bewakoof' jaise tag ya label kyun dete ho? Ek galti hui hai, sirf uss galti ki baat karo. Apne poore character par nishana mat saadhna. Aise label dimaag ko sach lagne lagte hain.

title: Galtiyan Humari Dost Hain
intended_use: Reframing mistakes as learning.
content: Bachpan mein jab hum pehli baar chalna seekhte hain toh hazar baar girte hain. Kya tab hum apne aap ko rote hue darate hain ki 'main kabhi nahi chal paunga'? Galtiyan karna toh naya seekhne ka signal hai. Agar aap se galti hui hai iska matlab aapne kuch naya try kiya hai jo doosre log wahan baith kar sochne ki bhi himmat nahi kar rahe the. Galti par garv karna shuru karo.

title: Peechhe Dekhna Chhodein
intended_use: Letting go of past rumination.
safety_notes: Validating the inability to change the past.
content: Gaadi chalate waqt agar sirf rear-view aine (peeche dekhne wale sheeshe) mein dekha jaye toh aage jald hi takkar ho jayegi. Zindagi bhi aisi hi hai. Jo kal ho gaya, ya do saal pehle jo ghalti hui thi—use wapas jaakar delete karne ka koi option nahi hai. Apna time aur dimaag un cheezon par kharch na karein. Aaj samne jo rasta hai, aapke hath mein sirf uska steering wheel hai.

title: Ek Kaam Ek Baar (Multitasking Jhut Hai)
intended_use: Reduces burnout from trying to do everything at once.
content: Aaj kal sabko 'Multitasking' aani chahiye aisi soch ban gai hai. Sath me TV, laptop, aur mobile sab ek dam. Aisa karne se dimag itna zyada load leta hai aur memory kamzor hoti hai. Khana kha rahe hoto bs khao, kaam kr rahe ho toh ekbaar me ek hi chiz kro. Ek chiz ko 15 min focus do, result badh jyga aur dimag cool rhta hai.

title: Body Aur Peth Ke Beech Connection
intended_use: Explains gut-brain physical symptoms.
content: Pehle bhi dhyan diya hoga jab exam ho ya koi nayi job ka pehla din, toh peth me ajeeb sa hona start hota hai. Jaise butterflies, ya nausea. Peth aur dimaag ka ek connection hota hai, anxiety sidha digestion pr asar dalti hai. Aisa jab ho, darao nahi. Samjho ki ye bs body ka tareeka hai tension dikhane ka. Thoda sa plain pani piyo, kuch halka kha lena, body jaldi cool down hogi.

title: Andar Ki Awaz (Mantra)
intended_use: Creates a stable inner thought during chaotic moments.
content: Jab as paas ki situations control se bahar lage, aur andar ghabrahat ho, apne aapse koi ek sentence baar-baar bolo jise dimag me thahrav aye. Jaise, 'Abhi jo hai usme mai surakshit hoon', ya 'Ye waqt bhi nikal jayega, hamesha aisa ni rahega.' Is ektarfa awaz se, tumhare dimag ko bhatakne ka mauka nahi milta, aur body normal mehsus karna shuru karti hai.

title: Sabko Khush Nahi Rakh Sakte
intended_use: Releasing the pressure to be a people-pleaser.
content: Kabhi socha hai dimaag kitna thakta hai jab hum sochte hain, 'Usko mera jawab bura toh ni lagega?' Hum poori zindagi sabko khush rakhne mein nikal aate hain, aur aakhir me khudko hi naraaz kar lete hain. Reality ye hai ki tum chah ke bhi sabko 100% waqt khush nahi rakh sakte. Aisa theka mat uthao. Agar koi tumse kisi baat par naraaz bhi hota hai, toh theek hai, thoda time do unhe naraz rehne. Tum apni shanti par dhyan do.

title: Break Lena Zaruri Hai
intended_use: Valuing rest in a hustle culture without medical jargon.
content: Logon ko lagta hai ki hamesha lagatar lagte rehne se chize jaldi hoti hain. Lekin bin break liye dimaag slow ho jata hai, aur choti mistakes badh jati hai. Aaram karna koi buri baat nahi hai. Jab mehsoos ho ki dimag aur body thak chuke hain, toh phone side me rakho aur 5 minute bas shanti se aankhe band kar ke beth jao. Thoda sa pause lena actually tumhe aage ke din ke liye active kar deta hai.

title: Galtiyan Sabse Hoti Hain
intended_use: Normalizing mistakes and reducing self-blame.
content: Agar aaj kuch galat ho gaya, chahe office mein ya ghar par, toh khud ko pura din bura-bhala kehne se kuch nahi badlega. Galtiyan insaan se hi hoti hain. Koi bhi perfect nahi hai, hum sab bus koshish kar rahe hain. Khud ko ek dost ki tarah samjhaiye, 'Han, galti hui, aage se dhyan rakhunga, par main iske liye poori zindagi khud ko saza nahi de sakta.' Aage badhna zaroori hai.

title: Neend Nahi Aa Rahi?
intended_use: Simple advice for sleepless nights.
content: Raat ko sab sant hota hai toh dimaag sabse zyada shor machata hai. Agar bed par lete hue 20 minute ho gaye hain aur neend nahi aa rahi, toh karwatein mat badalte rahiye. Uth kar bahar baithiye, ya thoda paani pijiye. Koi boring si book padhiye ya dimaag mein 100 se ulte number giniye (100, 99, 98...). Jab aankhon mein thakan mehsoos ho, tab wapas bed par aaiye.

title: Overthinking Ka Chakkar
intended_use: Explains overthinking simply as a stuck record.
content: Overthinking aisi cheez hai jaise ek hi gaana dimaag mein atak gaya ho aur baar-baar baj raha ho. Hum sochte hain ki zyada sochne se problem khatam ho jayegi, lekin asal mein dimaag sirf ek gol-gol chakkar laga raha hota hai jiska koi ant nahi. Is chakkar ko todne ke liye, jab lagatar purani baatein yaad aayein, toh khud ko rokein aur bolein: 'Bus, abhi main ispe aur nahi sochunga, kal dekhunga.'

title: Aas Paas Dekho (5-4-3-2-1)
intended_use: Translates sensory grounding into completely simple terms.
content: Dimaag ud chuka ho aur samajh na aaye kya karein, toh ek simple game kheliye. Aankhein kholiye aur aas paas 5 aisi cheezein dhoondhiye jinka rang neela ho, ya lal ho. Phir dhyan dekar 4 aawaazein sunne ki koshish karein—jaise bahar gaadi, AC ki aawaz. Phir 3 cheezon ko chhu kar dekhein—kambal, deewar, ya khud ka haath. Ye karne se aapka dhyan fikr se hatkar asli duniya mein aa jayega.

title: Ghabrahat Mein Saans
intended_use: Basic breathing guide for sudden panic.
safety_notes: Easy to follow, no strict counting.
content: Jab bhi achanak se darr ya ghabrahat lage kaanpte hue, toh sabse pehla kaam apni saans par dhyan dena hai. Darr mein hum jaldi-jaldi saans lene lagte hain. Isko todne ke liye, ek lambi saans ander lijiye, thodi der rokiye, aur phir dheere-dheere muh se aise chhodiye jaise chaai ko foonk maar rahe ho. 3-4 baar aisa karne se dil ki dhadkan thodi shant hone lagti hai.

title: Man Mein Jo Chal Raha Hai Likho
intended_use: Journaling simply to clear the mental load.
content: Ek time par dimaag mein kitni tension store karोगे? Ek paper lo, aur dil mein jo bhi bhadaas bhari ho, bina grammar ya spelling soche uspar utaar do. Kisi aur ko toh padhana nahi hai! Likhne se dimaag ka kachra paper par aa jata hai. Jab dimaag blank ho jaye, paper ko chaho toh faad kar fek do. Ye exercise ek chote therapy session jaisa kaam karti hai.

title: Maanne Ki Taqat (Acceptance)
intended_use: Accepting uncomfortable realities without fighting them constantly.
content: Dukh iss baat se nahi hota ki problem aa gayi, dukh iss baat se hota hai ki hum accept nahi kar paate ki 'yeh mere sath kyun ho raha hai'. ACT therapy mein sikhate hain ki barish ho rahi ho toh aasmaan se ladne ka fayda nahi, chhata nikalna behtar hai. Jis moment aap accept kar lete ho ki 'haan, ye situation abhi kharab hai', apka aadha stress waheen khatam ho jata hai.

title: Kaam aur Thakan ka Jaal
intended_use: Breaking the cycle of feeling guilty when tired.
content: Hum ek ajeeb chakkar mein faste hain: Jab hum thake hue hote hain toh theek se kaam nahi kar paate, aur kaam na kar paane ki wajah se humein guilt hota hai, aur voh guilt aur zyada thaka deta hai. Is chakkar ko todne ka ek hi tarika hai: Pura, proper rest lena bina is guilt ke. Dimag ki battery full charge kiye bina engine start karne ki koshish bilkul kaam nahi karti.

title: Zimmedari Ka Bojh
intended_use: Validation of the family provider's emotional exhaustion.
content: Humari family mein badi zimmedari aane ke baad insan rote hue dar ta hai ke baaki sab pareshan hngye. Sabki rozi, izzat aur umeed puri karte karte hum apna sukoon dhul chuke han. Aap par bojh hai is bat se na mukiye, aap thak jayein toh aap ko break lena haq hai. Superman ki tarha behave karne ki try dimag ke liye theek nahi.

title: Bahut Zyaada Sochna Bimari Nai
intended_use: De-pathologizing everyday overthinking.
content: Overthinking karna koi dimaag ki bimari nahi hai, yeh sirf ek aadat ban chuki hai aapke dimag ki – humesha problem se bachnay k liye alert rakhna. Darne wali koi bat nai h, ye us musclce ki trha hai jisko aapne stretch ziada kr diyea ha. Aap apne dimaag ko aram rkyhna b sikhaskatay ha slowly dheere practise s.

title: Kuchh Baaton Par Hans Do
intended_use: Using simple humor to defang anxiety.
content: Aksar choti baaton ko hum bahut badi bana dete hain—jaise public mein thodi beizzati ho jana, ya boss ke saamne stutter karna. Par life ki comedy waale angle se dekho. Apne upar hansna ek bohot badi taqat hai. Agli baar koi embarrassment ho, toh khud pe has do 'Yaar aaj toh gajab beizzati krayi maine.' Khud ko itna serious lena band karo, zindag aasan ho jayegi.

title: Soch Se Chipakna Chhodo
intended_use: Defusion exercise.
content: Aapka dimaag chalta phirta TV hai, uspar ajeeb-ajeeb scene chalte rahenge. Jo bhi scene ya darr aayein, unk aage aese bolna shuru karo: 'Mai abhi yeh soch raha hoon ki aage sab barbaad hone wala hai.' Yeh word add karne se aap aur aapke beech us bhari soch ka power kam ho jata hai, aur ye realize hota hai ki sach nahi, sirf ek soch hai.

title: Doosro Ko Nahi Badal Sakte
intended_use: Accepting that we can't control other people's actions.
content: Agar apko ghutan ho rahi h k mere ghar waly ya partner ye baat kyu nai smajh rahaa. Bahut kosish kar k thk chuky hain.. Toh ACT therapy sikhti hai ke ap dunyan ma sb kuch kr lenge lekin doosre insan ka dimagh control nai krskte. Tum bas apni raaye rkh skte h.. Unky control ke stress ko chooro, aur unhein un k raste par jane do q k wo adults hn.

title: Kyu Mujhase Judti Hai Sari Kharab Cheeze?
intended_use: Helping people out of the 'why me' phase.
safety_notes: Not invalidating their string of bad luck.
content: Jab ek k bad ek nuqsan hote hain jaise phone gum gaya, bike puncture, boss se daant padh gai..toh dimag me lagne lagta hai jaise kismat shraapit hai. Yeh sirf random coincidences hain jo humare saath bina reason hote hain. 'Kyun mere sath hi ghalat hua' sochkr depression aayega, lekin 'Koi bat nahi, ye din thek jayega' sochna is randomly gande din ko aram se nikalene ki dawai hai.

title: Naye Din Ki Fresh Shuruat
intended_use: Treating sleep as a reset button.
content: Technology ki tarah socho: jab phone hang ho jata hai toh hum use restart karte hain. Neend dimaag ka restart button hai. Agar aaj din bohot bekar tha, koi baat nahi. Phone me battery low hui, kal fir charge hoga. Raat ko sone ka time aaye toh socho, 'Aaj jaisa tha bura beeta, ab ye pannon (page) band, kal naya savera aur naya dimaag khulega'.

title: Tumhari Keemat (Self Worth)
intended_use: Self worth logic decoupled from achievement.
content: Aapki value iss baat se nahi aati ki aap kitne paise kamate ho, ya log aapki kitni tareef karte hain. Aap insaan ho, bas isliye respect deserve karte ho. Bachcha agar exam mein top na kare, toh kya achanak pyara nai rheta? Waise hi agar aap exam ya interview clear na bhi karo, tab bhi aap khud ke liye utne hi strong aur important ho.

title: Dimag Kyun Thak Jata Hai
intended_use: Explain mental fatigue in very basic terms.
content: Aapko kabhi lagta hai ki bina koi physical kaam kiye bhi aap bohot thak gaye hain? Ye isliye hota hai kyunki dimaag lagatar chal raha hota hai. Jab hum zyada sochte hain, ya tension lete hain, toh dimaag ki battery low ho jati hai, bilkul phone ki tarah. Aise mein 'arrey main itna kamzor kyun feel kar raha hoon' soch kar khud ko gaali mat dijiye. Dimaag ko bas thodi der switch off hone ka time chahiye. Ek chota sa break lijiye, bina phone ke.

title: Subah Phone Mat Dekhiye
intended_use: Advice to stop doom-scrolling upon waking up.
content: Jaise hi aankh khulti hai, hamara pehla haath phone par jata hai. Aur phone kholte hi 50 news, messages aur emails humare dimag par load daal dete hain, bina humein uthne ka mauka diye. Ye din ki aisi shuruwaat hai jaise uthte hi kisi ne aapko push kar diya ho. Koshish karein pehle ahe ghante phone side rakhein. Aaram se uthiye, muh dhoiye, paani pijiye, aur fir duniya ki problems se deal kariye.

title: Dusron Se Khud Ko Milana
intended_use: Tackles social comparison strongly.
content: Instagram aur WhatsApp par toh har koi bohot khush nazar aata hai. Nayi gaadi, nai job, achhe kapde. Par koi bhi apte bure din social media par post nahi karta. Agar aap apni haqeeqat ko dusron ke filter waali photos se compare karoge, toh dukh hi milega. Har insaan ki life mein pareshani hoti hai, bas tarika alag hota hai. Dusron ki journey par focus karne ke bajaye, khud par focus karein.

title: Sab Kuch Ek Saath Nahi
intended_use: Reduces overwhelm from large task lists.
content: Jab karne ko 100 cheezein hoti hain, aur waqt kam hota hai, toh dimaag darr ke maare kaam hi shuru nahi karta. Pura pahad mat dekhiye, nahi toh darr lagega ki kaise chadunga. Sirf apna agla kadam dekhiye. Jo sabse chhoti cheez abhi kar sakte ho—jaise sirf apne books ko bag se nikalna, ya ek single message ka reply dena—wo complete karlo. Ek baar shuruwat hoti hai toh aage ka rasta thoda aasaan dikhne lagta hai.

title: Khud Se Pyar Se Baat Karein
intended_use: Challenges negative self-talk.
content: Kabhi dhyan se suniye ki jab aap koi galti karte hain, toh khud ko mann hi mann mein kya-kya bolte hain. 'Mai toh pagal hoon', 'Mujhse toh kuch theek nahi hota'. Socho agar tumhara dost udaas hota toh kya tum usko bhi yahi sab bolte? Bilkul nahi! Tum usko hausla dete. Toh fir khud ko ye sab kyun bolna? Agli baar galti ho, toh apne aap ko waise hi sambhalo jaise kisi achhe dost ko sambhalte ho.

title: Kal Ki Fikar
intended_use: Addresses anxiety about future outcomes.
content: 'Kal kya hoga?', 'Agar wo nahi hua toh kya hoga?' Hum zindagi ka aadha waqt us 'kal' ke baare mein sochne mein nikal dete hain jisko humne aaj tak dekha hi nahi hai. Jo hona hai, wo hoga, aap chinta karke usko badal nahi sakte. Aapke haath mein sirf aaj ka waqt hai. Jab khud ko aesa sochte hue paayein, toh bolein: 'Kal ka kal dekhunga, abhi mujhe sirf apna aagla 1 ghanta theek se nikaalna hai.'

title: Gusse Ko Kaise Samjhein
intended_use: Helps distinguish anger from the deeper feelings underneath.
content: Gussa jaldi aata hai jab humein lagta hai koi humari baat nahi samajh raha ya humare saath kuch unfair hua hai. Par gussa akele nahi aata, wo kisi darde ya darr ko chhupa raha hota hai. Jab tez gussa aaye, toh turant react mat karein. Kamre se bahar niklein, paani pijiye, aur khud se puchiye: 'Main gusse mein hoon, ya andar hi andar dukhi ya akela feel kar raha hoon?'

title: Chhoti Khushiyan (Small Wins)
intended_use: Finding positivity in tiny daily achievements.
content: Jab waqt kharab chal raha ho, toh humein lagta hai ki kuch bhi acha nahi ho raha. Par aese mein badi kamyabi ka wait mat kariye. Subah time par uthna, achhe se nahana, ek cup badiya chai banakar peena—yeh sab bhi chhoti-chhoti kamyabiyan (wins) hain. In palon ko recognize karein. In chhoti cheezon par thoda khush hona seekhein, isse dimaag ko achha signal milta hai ki bhale hi problem ho, par sab theek bhi ho raha hai.

title: Rona Aaye Toh Ro Lena Chahiye
intended_use: Validates crying as a healthy emotional release.
content: Bohot baar hum aansu rokne ki koshish karte hain kyunki humein lagta hai rona kamzori hai. Par rona toh body ka apna tareeka hai dimaag ka pressure cooker halka karne ka. Jab andar bohot andar bohot tension bhar jati hai, toh aansuon ke zariye wo thodi release hoti hai. Agar rona aa raha hai, toh khud ko mat rokiye. Thodi der ro lene ke baad dimaag actually thoda saaf aur halka mehsoos hota hai.

title: Log Kya Kahenge
intended_use: Handling 'log kya kahenge' (what will people say).
content: Bharat (India) mein sabsbese badi bimari is soch ki h 'Char log kya kahenge'. Sachi bataun toh wo 4 log khud apne gharon ki problems me aise phase hue hain ki unke pas tumhare bare me sochne ka tym nahi h. Aur agar unhone kuch kaha bhi, toh kya badlega? Unki bakwas aapki roti nahi chin rahi. Jis din un 4 logon ko khush rakhna band kar diya, aadhi azadi tabhi mil jayegi.

title: Sab Ek Jaisa Feel Nahi Karte
intended_use: Normalizing neurodivergence/different emotional responses.
content: Aapko kabhi feeling aati hai ki 'sab log aaram se party mein chill kar rahe hain, par mujhe anxiety kyun ho rahi hai?' Sabka dimaag alag wiring se bana hai. Jo cheez kisi ke liye fun hai, wo aapke dimaag ke liye overload ho sakti hai. Isme aapki koi kami nahi hai. Apni battery ko pehchano aur uske hisab se chalo, na ki bheed (crowd) ko copy karne ki koshish karo.

title: Aadat Badalna Mushkil Par Mumkin
intended_use: Explaining the difficulty and hope in changing behaviour.
content: Jab ham koi nai sehatamand aadat bnane ki sochain ya puraani gande aadatein (late night sote rehna, overthink, overeat) chodna.. tou dimaag purana comfort talashtta hai. Usay comfort ni milta isliye apko phirse ussi line p lati h chiye. Waqt ke sath lagan jari rakhein, dimag nayi aadat apna lega.

title: Main Akela Hu Aisa Lagna
intended_use: Easing loneliness.
content: Bheed mein reh kar bhi akela feel hona aam baat hai. Akelepan ka matlab yeh nahi ki aapke aas paas log nahi hain, iska matlab hai ki aap jo feel kar rahe ho wo koi samajh nahi pa raha. Aise mein darrna mat. Khud apne dost bano, apne aap ko suno, aur phir kisi ek bharosemand insaan se milne jao. Online message se zyada thodi der face-to-face baat karna is akelepan ko jaldi door karta hai.

title: Khane Se Khushi (Comfort Eating)
intended_use: Addressing stress eating without body shaming.
content: Bohot stress mein aksar meetha ya junk food khaane ka man karta hai, kyunki khane se dimaag ko turant do minute ki dopamine (khushi) milti hai. Ye aadat bohot normal hai. Par ye relief sirf do minute ka hai. Khana khane par guilt mat mehsus karo, par agli baar jab stress ho toh dhyan dena ki kya is waqt sach mein bhook lagi hai, ya dimaag sirf khushi dhundh raha hai?

title: Bas Ek Phone Call Door
intended_use: Encouraging reaching out.
content: Jab dimag ajeeb socho mein fasa ho, toh ek sabse sasta theek hone ka tarika kisi dost ko call milana. Zaroori nahi problem batao, bas normal baat karo 'Aur bhai, kya chal raha hai?' Doosre ki daily zindagi ki problems aur gossips sunkar dimaag ki sui apne stress se hat jati hai. Dusron ki awaz best distraction hai.

title: Sabko Batana Zaroori Nahi
intended_use: Releasing the pressure of 'oversharing'.
content: Aaj kal ki duniya mein log bohot share karte hain, lekin agar aap kisi problem mein hain toh yeh zaroori nahi ki sabko bataya jaye. Jis se aap safe feel karte ho sirf usay hi apna asali roop dikhao. Agar duniya se chhupana zaroori lage toh theek hai, boundary rakh kar aap apne sukoon ki hifazat kar rahe ho.

title: Ek Kaam Zaroori
intended_use: Prioritization for overwhelmed people.
content: Jab bohot saare kaam ek saath hote hain aur sab ke sab zaroori lagte hain, toh aap phas jate ho. Apni list mein se koi aesi ek cheez dhoondo jo aap baaki sab chhod kar aaj complete kar sakte ho. Uske baad list faad ke phek do. Ek chota kaam complete karne par hi aapko 50% relaxation feel hogi.

title: Future Plan vs Aaj
intended_use: Anchoring in the current day.
content: 5 sall bad mei kahaa hoongaa aury merh kyy banegaag? Yeh saval insaano n dimgah p ek bohjn dalaaa jiskaa jwaaab kkkisy pass neh... Futureee 5 sll nai, sirf aaaajjjh klly shyam sa bnta ahiii.. Apnay aimhsy aikk hi kam dhiyhan do, aaja mujhe 4 bwjy tk kya krnnm ahi... Bs wo khtam karaow uske adad kal ka dakhyegiygeee

title: Raat Me Khud Ko Maaf Kar Dein
intended_use: Bedtime self-forgiveness.
content: Sone se pehle bohot log din ki galtiyan sochte hain.. 'mujhe waisa nahi bolna chahiye tha'. Ye overthinking aapko jagati hai. Is aadat ko todne ka ek rasta hai. Sone se pehle khud se kaho: 'Aaj jo hua so hua, maine apni taraf se puri koshish ki thi. Ab main is dimaag ko chhutti de raha hu. Kal naye din ki naye dimaag se shuruwat karunga.'

title: Acha Khaana Hai
intended_use: Eating a good meal as therapy.
content: Jab dimaag pareshan hota hai toh hum khana bilkul bhool jate hain. Fast food kha kar body ko ignore karte hain. Bhookh dimaag par bojh dalti hai, aur chidchidapan badhti hai. Ek achha, saaf aur healthy khana dimaag ke liye 100% gift ka kaam karta hai. Tension hone par pehla step: kya maine theek se pani piya aur khaya hai?

title: Aasuon Ko Rokna Band Karein
intended_use: Validating crying as emotional regulation.
content: Aansu aane par hum unhe rokne ki koshish karte hain, yeh soch kar ki 'main kamzor dikhunga'. Par aansu body ka natural pressure valve hote hain. Jab ghutan zyada badh jaye, toh uska bahar nikalna zaroori hai. Aansu behne do, rona ek therapy ki tarah dimaag ko shanti aur saaf sochne ki jagah deta hai.

title: Dusron Ki Nazar Se Khud Ko Dekhna
intended_use: Stopping the habit of viewing oneself through an imagined hostile external lens.
content: Aap sheeshe ke samne jate hain aur sochte hain, 'Log sochenge main kitna mota lag raha hu'. Ye apka dimaag dusron ki imaginary aawaz mein aapse judgi aur nafrat karta hai. Log itne vihale nahi hain. Apni value khud ki nazron se dekho. 'Main theek lag raha hu'. Apne aap ko baaki duniya ke imaginary taanon se mat maaro.

title: Peecha Chhudana Band Karein
intended_use: Why avoiding triggers doesn't work long term.
content: Kisi cheez se dar lagne par, us se peechoo chudana ya avoid karna us waqt shanti jarur deta hai, par long term mein aur fear badha deta hai. Jaise darwani dawai, theek hone ke leye thik thodi to leni padti. Agar call par baat krne sa panic lge toh msg na krein, jldi aur chhoti sa 1mnt call karein aur khudko dhikayen k ye impossible ya ja-aan lewah naw tha.

title: Khud Ko Time Do
intended_use: Giving oneself chronological grace to heal.
content: Ek toota hua haath plaster lagne ke agle din theek nahi ho jata. Use hapte/mahine lagte hain judne mein. Toh agar aapka dimaag ya dil toota hai, kisi nuksan ya failure se, toh agle din hi 'mai theek kyun nai ho raha' puch kar khud par gussa mat karo. Emotonal ghaav bhi time mangte hain. Unhe theek hone ke liye wahi patience do jo physical chot ko dete ho.

title: Darr Ke Saath Chalna
intended_use: Walking with fear instead of running from it.
content: Aap us din ka wait mat karein jab aapke andar ek boond darr nahi bachega tab hi aap koi naya kaam shuru karenge. Darr khatam karna namumkin hai kyu ke darr hi insaan ko zinda rakhta. Asli bahaduri darr na hone mein nahi hai. Asli bahaduri darr ko sath rakh kar, ghabrate hue bhi aage badh jana hai. Darr apke sath chalega lekin steering wheel aapke hath me hona chahiye.

title: Dusron Ki Khushi Ki Zimmedari
intended_use: Letting go of being the 'fixer'.
content: Aksar family ya doston mein agar kisi ka mood kharab ho toh humien lagta hai usey hasaana humara theka hai. Hum pareshan hojatey hain jab wo theek nai hotyeai. Sach yeh haiy ke har adult apnney happiness and emotions ka khuddhe zimmedar (responsible) hotyain hynai. App sirf sath dyksakteah hnyen... lakin appn inkaa mood switch naihn bdyhl shtktahya. Apnayyy uper yehhh bhhhhaari bojh na dlalloein.

title: Choti Choti Jeet
intended_use: Recognizing micro-wins on bad days.
content: Jab dimaag completely haara hua feel kare aur bed se uthne ki himmat na ho, tab duniya jeetna goal mat banao. Aaj ki badi jeet sirf nahana, brush karna, aur theek se ek roti khana bhi ho sakti hai. In chhoti jeet ko celebrate karo aur khud ko shabashi do jaise tum apne dost ko dete agar wo isi haalat se gujarta. Ek din mein sab theek hona zaroori nahi hai.

title: Sab Kuch Kharab Nahi Hai
intended_use: Black and white thinking correction.
content: Agar ek kaam kharab hua to dimaag bolta hai 'Meri toh zindagi hi kharab hai'. Yeh bilkul galat! Ek galti hone par apka poora din barbaad nai hota. Ek bure din par apki poori life fail nahi kano mani jasakti. Us waqt bas ye yaad karwayen apne aap ko, ki 'Sirf ek hissa kharab hua hai, baaki sab theek hai'. Pura safed paper mai ek kala daagh dhekne ki aadat badlein.

title: Pehle Thoda Ruko
intended_use: Curbing immediate impulsive reactions.
content: Jab koi kuch bura bolta hai toh hum turant react karte hain, bin soche samjhe 100 ki speed mein. Wahi ruk jao. Dusre ka gussa pakar ke wapas fekna zaroori nai hai. Lambi saans lo. Socho: 'Kya doosre ka gussa mujhe lena hai?' Tumhe chhooth mil gai. React karne ya shant rehkar wapas aane ka chota sa faisla zindagi k adhe jhagde khatam krda.

title: Uljhan aur Suljhan
intended_use: Externalizing worries on paper.
content: Dimaag mein jab saikdon problems ek sath ghumne lagte hain toh insan paralyse hone lagta hai. Iska sabse aasan aur best ilaj hai inko paper par likhna. Dimag ko lagta hai problem bahar aagai, paper pe agai hai. Aur fir aap calmly soch sakte ho ki ab is uljhan ko solve kahan se shuru kiya jaye. Dimagh saaf hojata hai likhne se.

title: Bore Hona Healthy Hai
intended_use: Removing fear of boredom.
content: Aaj kal kisi ko bus ya train mai wait krna pde to 1 sec me phone nikltaa ha.. Bore hunana jaise crime h gaya ho! Lekin puranay zamany me log akasr bore htay thy, us khaali waqt mai hi unky dimagh naye idea sochtay thy. Boredom dimakh ka free aur recovery time ha. Aaj kal 15 minute bina screen ke, bs ceiling dakh kar bore bny, ye dmagah dhota h.

title: Aadat Se Majboor
intended_use: Breaking bad habits is hard.
content: Baar baar ek galat aadat dohrane ka matlab ye nahi ki ap character less ya weak hain. Dimagh us purani routine mein comfort (aaram) dhoondta hai. Naye raaste pe chalna mushkil hota hai, isliye pehli baar fail hona bilkul normal hai! Khud ko bura bhala mat khein, lagatar koshish jari rakhein, dimaag naye aadat ka path 21 din mein pakad lega.

title: Dusron Ke Problem Solve Karna
intended_use: Stopping the chronic 'fixer' role.
content: Aap apne har relative aur dost ka 'helpline number' ban chuke ho kya? Koi problem mai ho to ap sb chor kar usy theek karne dodh padte ho. Ye pyar toh hai, par uske badle khud ka chain chhen letah. Dosaron ko unki problem khud solve karne dia kro, tbhi unme experience aega. Tum sirf advice do, unka boj khudpe uthana tumhara job nahi ahai.

title: Khuli Hawa Aur Walk
intended_use: Taking a quick walk to stop overthinking.
content: Andar baithe baithe jab room ki hawa bhar jati hai, dimag me thoughts takrakar wapas dimag me hi ghusne lagte hain. Aise point par kamre sa bahar, sadak par ya park mein sirf 10 minute chalo. Paon ki chot, kutton ka shor, ped, patte– bahar ki duniya mein dimaag ko itni cheezein dekhti hain ki wo negative loops bhool kar natural bahar ki baaton mein engage hone lagta hai.

title: Kya Ho Sakta Hai (Worst Case)
intended_use: Decatastrophizing in simple terms.
content: Jab dar lagta hai, toh dimag film chalata hai jisme sabse extreme buri cheezein hoti hain. 'Meri job chali jayegi main road pe aa jaunga!' Is movie ko wahi roko aur fact pe aoo: 'Aisa sach me hone ke chance kitne hain?' Aur by chance agar job chali bi gayi, toh kya mai waha fas ke reh jaunga? Nahi, mai koi aur kaam dhoondh lunga. Aap hamesha ek rasta nikal loge.

title: Zindagi Ka Remote Control
intended_use: Reclaiming agency from others' opinions.
content: Apni khushi aur gham ka remote control kisi aur insan ke hath me kyun de rakha hai? Agar unhone tareef ki toh aap khush, unhone reply nahi dia toh aap poora din udas. Dusron ki reaction apke mood ko chalane nahi chahiye. Ye realize karo ki tumhari apni value us remote me nai, tumhare andar hai. Logo ko unka kaam krne do, apni shanti apne hath mein rakho.

title: Aankhein Aur Sitare
intended_use: Nighttime grounding looking at the sky.
content: Agar raat main tension ho aur theek na lagrha ho, toh window khol kar ya chath pe ja kar aasmaan mein sitare aur chand ko dhekein. Soochein k ye duniyna kitni badi haai auru us may mehanat karnah wale log aur hamri yhe takllif bhi kinti mamumli hai aasmaan kye samne . Yyhe aamaassamn appko pereeaceffull bnata aiah... Thodi der aasmaa ko sirf aasaamaaan mhaan ke dekiienyan.

title: Aaj Nahi Toh Kal
intended_use: Postponing anxiety about overwhelming events.
content: Apko tension ho rai hai ke aglay week wala kaam theek nahi ho ga.. Toh panic attack se bachne ka nuskha ye hy ke, dimagh ko kaho: 'Mai agle weak wala problem abhi solve nai kar para, mai ye problem monday ke lie chhod raha hu, monday ka mera dimag isay cover krlega'. Dimagh apko usi tym relax kar dedga agr ap waqt lelen.

title: Haathon Par Paani
intended_use: Alternative rapid grounding.
content: Gussa ya pareshani ho rha hai toh ek aur quick tareeka: basin jao, nal kholo aur apna dono hath thande paani k neechy rakhiay. Sirf hathu par flow hitay paani ko mehsooos karyen.. Uski thndak , uski aawwzaeeein. Ekdam se thoughts wahaan focus hnengay awr panic giray ghaa yhe theraappy wali effect karta hy freee mmh.

title: Chalta Firta Meditation
intended_use: Walking mindfulness for those who can't sit still.
content: Aankh band karke dhyan lagana sabke bus ki baat nahi. Anxiety me chup chap baithne se ghabrahat aur badhti hai. Aise me chalo! Ghar ke andar ya bahar walk karo. Par is baar sochte hue nai, apna pura dhyan apne paon (feet) par rakho. Zameen par joota kaise touch ho raha hai? Pura pressure kese badal raha hai? Isko mindful walking kehte hain, aur ye utna hi asardar hai.

title: Nahi Ya 'Kya Pata' (Uncertainty)
intended_use: Accepting uncertainty.
content: Dimagh ko saary sawalon k jawab abhi aur isi waqt chachiaye! 'Kya mere 100 number aenge?', 'Kya mai interview mai pass hunga?'. Lekin ye uncertain hai (pata nahi). Is cheez se dosti kar Lein - Haan mjhy nhe pata cal kia hoga , pr ye normal baat ha, meri try wahi rahegy mere haath me sirf aaj h.

title: Khud Ki Taarif Kiya Karo
intended_use: Practicing self-praise without arrogance.
content: Hum sab intezaar karte hain ki boss ya dusre log humari taarif karein tabhi hum aache hain. Lekin unka mood roz badalta hai. Subah sheeshe ke samne khade hokar agar ek baar muskura kar bolein: 'Tune kal mushkil din seh liya, shabash!', toh us ek shabd se dimag mein confidence aa jata hai. Apni peeth thapthapane mein koi sharam ya ghamand nai.

title: Maan Lojiye Ki Chot Lagi Hai
intended_use: Accepting emotional pain like physical pain.
content: Agar apka pav table par zor se lage, toh aap chillayege ya roenge par isey chhupaigya nahi... waisehi jab kisi ne aapko sad kiya, tab apne dimaagh me is mental dukh ka mzaaaq mat udhiayhh. Isey waisihi ezzat dehyn jaise physical pain ka. 'Mujhe abhi hurt hui ha , mujhe time chayeh'. Ise quabool kariye.

title: Ek Saans Ka Gap
intended_use: The power of pausing.
content: Ghusssey mmey aakaaarr hmlog kbbh kuchiayseey baatinn krdetahii hn jihsnk bad mm pachhatnattah hota hyh.. Kisi ko reply yhn jwabab detey timne sirfyhk 3 secndnddkdhn ka geap lieyi, ghariiiii ssshhahhhans lien.. ye hhgapapph appkhy diammghh kyy lohhgeikk waahleeeh hinsnsnsaay koh jahggahhheyeigahh, aura abapp glti nhkiyi hhkarigeeiyege.

title: Apne Aap Se Puchiye, Aaj Kya Chahiye?
intended_use: Self check-ins.
content: Hum machine ki traha roz bs kaam krne ke liye programmed hain. Ek baar bhi hum khudse nahi pucte ke aja mera mood kaysa h aur usay aaj kya khahihya. Aaj 2 mint khud ke sath bethkar sehiyo, 'Aaj kya karnya se main thoda sukooon feel krunga?' Chahe woh eik barish wali neend hi kyun na ho. Us cheez ko priority do aaj!

title: Kabhi Haar Nahi Hoti
intended_use: Normalizing professional or academic failure.
content: Exam ya job test mein haar jna koi duniya khatam wala stamp nai. Failure ka asli meaning hy 'Mujhe ye abhi sekhna pary ga'. Ye apko batati k pichi wali try mein kuch kami thii, apni ghalti ko dekhna success ki paheli sidhi h . Tum kamzor naai hoe ho, sirf ek attempt miss hoawa h! Ek baar phr udht kr nayi technique try kre!

title: Apne Man Ko Letter Likho
intended_use: Self-compassionate writing prompt.
content: Agar bhtt ghutan haii and no one to talk to... then pick up a diary. Us diary may apne liey ek letter lkihh: 'Hello, aaj main boht depressed fill karrah ah u , sab khrabah h..' Jaisa dost se ror kar boltte wesa khud ko likhien... yeh bht strong relief dhdtyha ha dimahj kuko !!

title: Thodi Se Hi Kaafi Hai (Good Enough)
intended_use: Tackling perfectionism.
content: Agar main safayi karu to eik daag ni rehna chaiye! Yeh 'perfection' ki bhook aap ka zehen kha rhi h. Duniya mein zada tra kam agar 'Good Enough' (Bht theek han) ho jaien to unho accept karlia jata ha . Khudko perfect bnane ke lhiiye paagahll mhtha karey. 80% perfect , 20 % thehk hai chhle gahaa a .

title: Sochain Badalne Wala Khail
intended_use: Simple CBT game.
content: Jab dimagh eik negative souch bar bsr bolhy.. ''Tu hmesha letata (late) hotahaayhh'.. Tou ust usuyt time ek positive bt bhi dhundo jo tmne achi ki thi.. 'leaikn aj myne kam sai se kniamtaa liya ta'.. Ye ek gmaemee kmimkhehtlhkehleleehlell , dnnddimmiaiamgagg g hh k kokyo o b baabblaablablaalannaanlnancecneeec c c msmmmnaemaimeiemeniiinnmneeee rr rkar a akkahkhkahakkkhnaahkniaahnahn a aa as saassshiahishihaikaihihykikiahyhayihkhiyaayyyhah.a....

title: Jab Dimaag Jam Jaye (Brain Fog)
intended_use: Explaining cognitive freeze during burnout.
safety_notes: Normalizes inability to focus without raising panic.
content: Kabhi lagta hai dimaag ke andar dhundh (fog) chha gai hai aur chhoti se chhoti cheez yaad nahi aa rahi? Ise brain fog kehte hain. Ye koi memory ki bimari nai, balki dimaag ke over-exhaust hone ki nishani hai. Jab dimaag par boht zyada tension aur kaam ka load lamba chalta hai, toh wo apni speed slow kar leta hai. Ek din ki acchi chhutti aur stress free neend hi iska ilaaj hai, darna nahi.

title: Naam Se Bulao (Defusion)
intended_use: Playful ACT defusion.
content: Aapka dimaag baar-baar ek hi darawni story sunata hai? 'Dekh tera career khatam ho jayega!' Is story ko ek funny sa naam dedo. Jaise 'Acha, Doom-doom uncle phir aagye kahanie lekar'. Jab aap is negative aawaz ko eak ajeeb naam se bulate ho, toh andar se darr kam lagne lagta hai, kyu ke apko realize hota hai ki ye koi serious sachaaii nai, sirf dimagh ki aadat hai darane ki.

title: Sharam aur Gilti (Guilt vs Shame)
intended_use: Distinguishing behavior from self-worth.
content: Guilt ka matlab hai 'Maine kuch galat kiya'. Par Shame ka mtlb ha 'Mebhi hi pura galat insane hoon'. Guilt thek hia ku ka ye humny nayi chezz aachy triqy ss krnysikata .. Par shame ander sa aapka confidence tor dataah h.. Agale bhr gaar kuch ghalty huo yh smjhhhi k ghaltee app ny kk haykhi par apkhudh gkalty naaieh ho.

title: Peecha Mat Karo
intended_use: Paradoxical intention for sleep.
content: Nend ek bilia k taraahy h... jitnausyk pkdreny bhghiguy , utnsahi w dhor bahehigeyh .. Bistr p r leit kr gar aysa shocnhoe : mhyjnj nened kiub ni aahrii?, tguh nnendk akbi nnini ayahggehe... Usuy pkdkdhhndnhyy a ccchor dhdo .Aakhkh bbadn kkrkoey aooir shuoccoj k mainhhhy nnaiii shosnna hha iia ia ajj aajjj... Tmbhk dhhkekenhna k aakaissahy nmeynedn appko pkdkdleillegghihi...

title: Raat Ke Vichar (Night Thoughts)
intended_use: Handling 2 AM anxiety attacks.
content: Raat k time hammaari logic wallali brains switch of hjtaey hai jkisai waajjh syy har problemm pahaaad lgttiti hai. 2 bajey agar lagrhhy ky dunia khttahm horhhyea.. tahab khud ko dilaaasa donin ke yeh sirf thakti huai aankho ka darrr hanai. Kisi problem ko raatt meiin hal karrrni kki koshishesh nnahkariyianh. Subhaa uthnh par 90% tension khhudhi kam houh jyhehhaygee.

title: Apna Vakil Baniye
intended_use: Putting inner critic on trial.
content: Jab tumhara dimaag tumhei court ke beech khada kr ke mujrim banata hy, 'Tu fail hn khrbh', tb chu p maat bethena. Apinye andhaar ka vvakiill jaggakry bss ek ssvaval puochoo, 'Sabutk ddekkhao? Kny ahain issa jo hmashaan fail hoa hn?' Apko bht seyese momenyents yadd aaengayeay jbb appne ccccheezyen thekkn kii han, sabhooot ko dkkaherkrnn dmimaghh ki jhhuutti baat ko khakariijj krraooo.

title: Dhoop Aur Hawwa Mien Rehna
intended_use: Nature as a mood reset.
content: Andhere room me bistr pr pade rhen se dimgagh ko signal mital taa hai kyi yehi duniya hai. Jis se baaoreyat aorr gham bardhata hai. Apni jgha badlo, balcony se bahar k dhhoop pr jao. 10 minut bhttihhn ke bd apnjii body nmein thohda halhkappan mehmus kruoge. Surjnnn kii roosnihnn mind ke ander kiii chemicaalls ku bbbbalaanss khhhrtnhheih hain...

title: Ek Cup Chaii Ka Sukoon
intended_use: Mindfulness using the daily tea habit.
content: India me chai lagbhag sab peete hain. Kal wali tension ya future ki fikar me agar ap subah ki pheli chai pi rahe hain aue taste bhi nai aaraha, toh ye bohot ghalat hai. Chai ka cup haath mae lo, uski garmi ko ungliyon per mehasus kro... Uske pehlee ghooot (sip) ke taste per 100% full dhyan lagha do. Isey Mindfulness kehatay hn, ye dimaakh ko current time me laa kr free karta haai.

title: Dosto Ke Sath Mazaa
intended_use: Using light social interaction as relief.
content: Humehhhah seriouss baaatny rky rknny h zrurii naih hia. Kbhibih apanany dushutontyn ko msislsly jn in jinki i sthahtsh bskabsa bwakhwwaksasak sh hyorhor krnyniyh mnmehaaiye mzaazza aaytayahh a hh.  Hnnaasassnhhnnaan aaaaouuururr ffzuzulzulzu uu ll kkkiik iy bhhaaattaateeteintn iknkkryryknnanaan bhbbhbhbibibi  ddeiimdimimmmaaghmga k khkaoyho ok k aachchacachchchochhhecaec hssshsesesy e e reeerreeessestseeetteetrt kkkhakrkrkratarataraatta atthaahhiaaiahh i i..

title: Thodi Thodi Khushi
intended_use: Finding small joys daily.
content: Aaj ye maaan loo k ajj khusi h ya nahi.. chhootti se cheez jo bs 2 minot tk achi laghy.. Jaise window me hawa y kisi street dog ku bitcsut khilna. Rozana ese chhhoteyh pal dhonnndiyee , apka day thek hu jta.. inme apnayr khudhk a nntntroolorl hh tah a hhyohtothaaat  hhahyaaii  jho hj joj kj a kaafkafaffifaiffiai ih ihaahyayihiii.

title: Sab Kuch Ek Dum Se Nahi Hoga
intended_use: Reduces panic of having too much to do.
content: Jab 10 kaam samne pade hote hain, toh humein lagta hai ki hum fail ho gaye kyunki sab ekdum se nahi ho raha. Par sachai yeh hai ki aapke paas do hath aur ek dimaag hai. Ek time par ek hi kaam ho sakta hai. Lambi saans lo aur sabse zaroori ek kaam chuno. Baaki sab kuch der ke liye bhool jao. Ek-ek karke nipatane se pahad bhi chota ho jata hai.

title: Darr Ke Aage
intended_use: Facing small fears sequentially.
content: Darr hamesha us cheez se lagta hai jo humne abhi tak face nahi ki. Hum dimaag mein us cheez ka ek hawwa bana lete hain ki 'mujhse nahi hoga'. CBT kahti hai ki jis cheez se darr lagta hai, usko thoda sa chhu kar dekho. Agar naye logon se baat karne mein darr lagta hai, toh bas ek baar kisi ko 'Hello' bol kar dekho. Aapko realise hoga darr sirf dimaag mein tha, asliyat mein nahi.

title: Neend Aur Mood Ka Connection
intended_use: Links sleep deprivation directly to bad mood.
content: Kabhi note kiya hai jis raat neend poori nahi hoti, agle din har baat chubh rahi hoti hai? Neend kam aana sidha aapke mood ko control karta hai. Agar aaj poora din kisi baat par rona aa raha hai ya gussa aa raha hai, toh pehle check karo ki pichli raat kitni der soye the? Shayad problem utni badi nahi hai, bas neend poori na hone ki wajah se dimaag usey bada bana raha hai.

title: Zameen Par Pao (Grounding)
intended_use: Physical grounding using the floor.
content: Jab dimaag hawa mein ud raha ho aur ek ke baad ek negative thoughts aa rahe hon, toh ek kursi par aaram se baith jayein. Apne dono pao zameen par tika lein. Thoda sa dabav banayein aur us zameen ko mehsoos karein. Apne aap se bolein, 'Zameen ne mujhe sambhala hua hai. Main abhi yahan hoon, aur safe hoon'. Yeh chhota sa action dimaag ko wapas present mein le aayega.

title: Koi Perfect Nahi
intended_use: Addresses the desire to be a flawless person.
content: Hum sab sochte hain ki ideal ban kar hi pyar ya respect milti hai. Jo mistake free ho, hamesha khush rahe. Lekin perfection duniya ka sabsbese bada jhooth hai. Jo dikhne mein perfect lag raha hai, wo andar se utna hi tuta hua ya preshan ho sakta hai. Aap jaise ho, apni kamiyon aur khubiyon ke sath, exactly waise hi kafi ho. Machine nahi ho jo har waqt theek se kaam kare.

title: Ghumne Jaane Ka Fayda
intended_use: Encourages a small daily walk.
content: Pura din band kamre mein screen ke samne baithe rehne se thoughts aapas mein takrane lagte hain. Bahar fresh hawa mein paanch minute chalne se actually dimaag ke raste khul jate hain. Zaroori nahi ki exercise hi ki jaye, bas aas-paas ka rasta dekhte hue chalo. Dhoop, hawa aur bahar ka shor dimaag ka internal shor chup kara dete hain.

title: Dusron Ki Fikar Karna Chhodo
intended_use: Letting go of responsibility for others' feelings.
content: Aap akele sabko khush karne ka theka lekar nahi ghoom sakte. Agar kisi dusre ka mood kharab hai, toh automatically yeh mat soch len ki 'shayad meri wajah se hai'. Logon ke paas apni hajaron problems hoti hain. Unki feelings ki responsibility khud par mat lijiye. Agar unhe aapse problem hogi, toh aakar bataenge. Apne app soch soch kar darrna band karein.

title: Udasi Aur Depressed Hone Mein Farak
intended_use: Distinguishes normal sad days from deeper issues mildly.
content: Kabhi kabhi koi khaas wajah na hone par bhi man bohot udaas rehta hai. Iska matab yeh bilkul nahi ki aap depressed ho. Jaise physical energy up down hoti hai, waise hi mood bhi up down hota hai. Ek gande din ko le kar panic na karein. Bas khud ko waqt dein. Raat ko so jayen, agle din ya do din mein cheezein wapas theek mehsoos hone lagengi.

title: Worry Time Fix Karein
intended_use: Scheduling worry time in Hindi.
content: Din bhar chinta karte rahoge toh kuch nahi kar paoge. Ek mast tarika yeh hai ki apni chinta ko ek waqt de do. Jaise, sham ko 5 se 5:20 tak main jee bhar ke chinta karunga. Uske ilawa, jab bhi din mein koi buri soch aaye, usay copy par likh lo aur kaho, 'Main 5 baje iske baare mein sochunga'. Mostly 5 baje tak bhool hi jaoge.

title: Sirf Sunna Kaafi Hai
intended_use: How to actively listen to a friend easily.
content: Jab koi aapse aakar rotay hue apni problem batata hai, toh dimag force karta hai ki turant koi achhi si advice dekar uski problem theek kardo. Par log advice sunne nahi aate, wo apna dukh halka karne aate hain. Aise mein unko solution mat do, bas suno. Kaho ki 'Mujhe samajh aa raha hai tumhein kaisa feel ho raha hai, yeh waqayi bura hai'. Sirf samajhna hi sabse bada sahara hota hai.

title: Kabhi Haar Nahi Hoti
intended_use: Normalizing professional or academic failure.
content: Exam ya job test mein haar jna koi duniya khatam wala stamp nai. Failure ka asli meaning hy 'Mujhe ye abhi sekhna pary ga'. Ye apko batati k pichi wali try mein kuch kami thii, apni ghalti ko dekhna success ki paheli sidhi h . Tum kamzor naai hoe ho, sirf ek attempt miss hoawa h! Ek baar phr udht kr nayi technique try kre!

title: Apne Man Ko Letter Likho
intended_use: Self-compassionate writing prompt.
content: Agar bhtt ghutan haii and no one to talk to... then pick up a diary. Us diary may apne liey ek letter lkihh: 'Hello, aaj main boht depressed fill karrah ah u , sab khrabah h..' Jaisa dost se ror kar boltte wesa khud ko likhien... yeh bht strong relief dhdtyha ha dimahj kuko !!

title: Thodi Se Hi Kaafi Hai (Good Enough)
intended_use: Tackling perfectionism.
content: Agar main safayi karu to eik daag ni rehna chaiye! Yeh 'perfection' ki bhook aap ka zehen kha rhi h. Duniya mein zada tra kam agar 'Good Enough' (Bht theek han) ho jaien to unho accept karlia jata ha . Khudko perfect bnane ke lhiiye paagahll mhtha karey. 80% perfect , 20 % thehk hai chhle gahaa a .

title: Sochain Badalne Wala Khail
intended_use: Simple CBT game.
content: Jab dimagh eik negative souch bar bsr bolhy.. ''Tu hmesha letata (late) hotahaayhh'.. Tou ust usuyt time ek positive bt bhi dhundo jo tmne achi ki thi.. 'leaikn aj myne kam sai se kniamtaa liya ta'.. Ye ek gmaemee kmimkhehtlhkehleleehlell , dnnddimmiaiamgagg g hh k kokyo o b baabblaablablaalannaanlnancecneeec c c msmmmnaemaimeiemeniiinnmneeee rr rkar a akkahkhkahakkkhnaahkniaahnahn a aa as saassshiahishihaikaihihykikiahyhayihkhiyaayyyhah.a....

title: Raat Me Khud Ko Maaf Kar Dein
intended_use: Bedtime self-forgiveness.
content: Sone se pehle bohot log din ki galtiyan sochte hain.. 'mujhe waisa nahi bolna chahiye tha'. Ye overthinking aapko jagati hai. Is aadat ko todne ka ek rasta hai. Sone se pehle khud se kaho: 'Aaj jo hua so hua, maine apni taraf se puri koshish ki thi. Ab main is dimaag ko chhutti de raha hu. Kal naye din ki naye dimaag se shuruwat karunga.'

title: Waqt Ko Apne Sath Chalne Do
intended_use: Removing artificial urgency.
content: Hum tension le kar har kaam jaldi jaldi karte hain, jaise train nikalne wali ho. Ye saari musibat hum khud paida karte hain. Aaram se saans lo. Waqt aapke aage nahi bhag raha, wo aapke sath chal raha hai. Kisi bhi kaam ko 'jaldi' khatam karne ka tag mat lagao, usay 'theek se' aur 'aram se' karne ka tag lagao. Aadhe darr waheen khatam zaroor honge.

title: Acha Khaana Hai
intended_use: Eating a good meal as therapy.
content: Jab dimaag pareshan hota hai toh hum khana bilkul bhool jate hain. Fast food kha kar body ko ignore karte hain. Bhookh dimaag par bojh dalti hai, aur chidchidapan badhti hai. Ek achha, saaf aur healthy khana dimaag ke liye 100% gift ka kaam karta hai. Tension hone par pehla step: kya maine theek se pani piya aur khaya hai?

title: Aasuon Ko Rokna Band Karein
intended_use: Validating crying as emotional regulation.
content: Aansu aane par hum unhe rokne ki koshish karte hain, yeh soch kar ki 'main kamzor dikhunga'. Par aansu body ka natural pressure valve hote hain. Jab ghutan zyada badh jaye, toh uska bahar nikalna zaroori hai. Aansu behne do, rona ek therapy ki tarah dimaag ko shanti aur saaf sochne ki jagah deta hai.

title: Dusron Ki Nazar Se Khud Ko Dekhna
intended_use: Stopping the habit of viewing oneself through an imagined hostile external lens.
content: Aap sheeshe ke samne jate hain aur sochte hain, 'Log sochenge main kitna mota lag raha hu'. Ye apka dimaag dusron ki imaginary aawaz mein aapse judgi aur nafrat karta hai. Log itne vihale nahi hain. Apni value khud ki nazron se dekho. 'Main theek lag raha hu'. Apne aap ko baaki duniya ke imaginary taanon se mat maaro.

title: Peecha Chhudana Band Karein
intended_use: Why avoiding triggers doesn't work long term.
